title: CDK Python foundation for multi-tenant cloud console stack
description:
## Intent
Build a separate Python CDK app that defines the foundational cloud infrastructure for the Kanbus console backend.

## Scope
- VPC and networking for Lambda + EFS
- EFS filesystem and access points
- Lambda container runtime wiring
- REST API Gateway integration (streaming-compatible)
- IAM boundaries and stack outputs

## Definition of Done
- One-command deploy works with `AWS_PROFILE=anthus`.
- Outputs include API URL, Cognito IDs, IoT endpoint, and EFS mount metadata.
- Infra synthesis/deploy docs are committed and accurate.
- Baseline smoke check confirms Lambda can read tenant root on EFS.
creator: ryan.porter

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: Workstream activated; starting Python CDK skeleton and deployment shape.
Evidence: task state moved open -> in_progress; parent epic tskl-eo2.5 in progress.
Next: add cdk app scaffold + stack boundaries + required outputs.
Risk/Blocker: none.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: Continuity note for reconnects.
Evidence: deployment target profile = anthus; runtime assumptions = multi-tenant, read-only v1, GitHub-webhook sync.
Next: preserve these assumptions in stack/env docs as they are codified.
Risk/Blocker: none.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: CDK foundation scaffold implemented and synthesized successfully.
Evidence: infra/cloud app+stack+Dockerfile added; `AWS_PROFILE=anthus npx cdk synth -a "/opt/anaconda3/bin/conda run -n py311 python app.py"` passes.
Next: run deploy verification path with AWS_PROFILE=anthus before closing this task.
Risk/Blocker: deploy step pending.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: Starting deploy verification path for cloud foundation.
Evidence: synth already passing from previous checkpoint.
Next: run AWS_PROFILE=anthus cdk deploy for KanbusCloudFoundation and capture outputs.
Risk/Blocker: deployment may require CDK bootstrap or IAM grants.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: Deploy verification attempt executed and blocked at image build step.
Evidence: `cdk deploy` failed with `Cannot connect to the Docker daemon at unix:///Users/ryan.porter/.docker/run/docker.sock` while building ConsoleLambda/AssetImage.
Next: unblock by starting Docker daemon locally (or switching to prebuilt ECR image path), then rerun deploy.
Risk/Blocker: BLOCKED - Docker daemon unavailable for container asset build.
